system.description: Warden Khalana Uress was the Head Confessor of the Spirit Wardens. She recorded secrets that were only for the use of the order using a book code, coordinates that pointed to words in a specific book. Without that book, the code cannot be cracked. Daring thieves took the book, then lost it.
system.additional_info: Fakes come on the market all the time. Only the Spirit Warden leadership know what the book looked like, and they aren't telling. What is the Diary about?
